title: Normalized Feed Domain, Content Variants, and Provenance
description: RSS and Atom transport structs leak into storage, missing data is invented, HTML and text are conflated, source identifiers are discarded, and updates cannot be explained. Learners cumulatively produce loss-aware normalized feed and entry model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Convert format-specific transport values into validated feed, entry, person, link, category, content, and provenance domain types.
Choose entry identity from stable Atom ID, RSS GUID semantics, canonical link, or scoped content fingerprint with explicit precedence.
Preserve plain text, escaped HTML, XHTML, external content, summary, and missing content as distinct bounded states.
